final:
// // This is a 4-bit asynchronous counter with an active-low reset and a synchronous enable.
module sync_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [1:0] count);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 2'b00;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
